completed.summary: Y* schema v2 validator hooked into 3 production entry points (czl_new_campaign.sh / czl_boot_inject.py / generate_world_state.py). Invalid stubs now blocked at creation time. WORLD_STATE.md Section 4 reports N/M compliance.
Prompt gate (check_ceo_output_vs_subgoal) hooked into PostToolUse. Drift score > 0.7 emits CIEU PROMPT_SUBGOAL_DRIFT event (warn-only, fail-open). Hook registered in .claude/settings.json.
